info.name: Fileam Backend API (Updated)
info.description:
Fileam Backend API v1. Base: {{baseUrl}}/api/v{{apiVersion}}. Auth: Bearer {{accessToken}} (collection prerequest sets Authorization except onboarding, AI routes, invitation accept/decline links, and /public/account-deletion). Upload files via Media first, then use returned URL in other endpoints. Enterprise Signup: Step Email → Step Email verify (saves enterpriseOnboardingToken) → Step Password (requires Authorization: Bearer {{enterpriseOnboardingToken}}). Expense categories: Rent, Tools & Software, Marketing, Internet, Salary, Other. Sale categories: Consulting, Product Sales, Service Income, Subscription, Other. Expenses: optional supplierName, supplierId (JSON keys supplierName/supplierId or Supplier_name/Supplier_Id). Sales (income): optional customerName (existing), customerId (or Customer_name/Customer_id). Enterprise financials POST .../transactions passes these through when type expense|income and client is linked. Employment types: Part time, Full time, Contract.

Linked-client P&L (consultant): GET enterprise/clients/:clientId/financials/profit-loss — :clientId is the linked mobile user UUID (same as {{clientId}} / {{clientUserId}} from Managed Entities or Clients list). Query: year+month for one calendar month; omit year/month for current month; year alone = full year; preset=thisMonth|thisYear; dateFrom & dateTo for custom range. Response includes formulas, attachmentGaps, period.month when a single month.

Mobile: PATCH /mobile/sales/:id and PATCH /mobile/expenses/:id (partial update). Mobile filings list/detail: completionPercent, periodAttachmentGaps. Consultant filing for client: POST /mobile/filings/consultant/clients/:clientUserId/tax/:taxType/submit with clientApprovalConfirmed true (same UUID as enterprise client path).

Consultants: Mobile GET /mobile/consultants (directory, query q/page/limit) and POST /mobile/consultants/request with consultantUserId. Mobile GET /mobile/consultant-requests returns pending items; each item includes initiator consultant_to_client (consultant invited you — use Accept/Decline in app) or client_to_consultant (you requested — consultant accepts via email link). Email links (no auth): GET /api/v{{apiVersion}}/invitations/:id/accept/:code and .../decline/:code — set {{invitationLinkId}} and {{invitationLinkCode}} from the email.

Enterprise client filings: GET .../filings/constants returns tax types, payment/filing status enums, report types, period bounds, capabilities, and relative paths for tax-computation GETs. GET .../filings/returns lists period returns for all taxes (optional query taxType=VAT|WHT|...); GET .../filings/vat-returns remains VAT-only. GET/PUT .../filings/tax-types lists/updates active codes. POST .../filings/vat|wht|cit|paye/submit-return — same body shape as VAT (for WHT, amount = total WHT due). POST .../filings with taxType remains available. GET .../filings/:filingId/report as before.

Mobile filings: GET .../filings/constants (same shape as enterprise constants). Unified active-type routes: GET/POST .../filings/tax/:taxType/preview|draft|submit (use {{unifiedTaxType}} e.g. VAT, WHT, CIT, PAYE). Legacy /filings/vat/* and /filings/wht/* unchanged.

Account deletion: Mobile GET/POST .../mobile/account-deletion/reason-categories and .../request (authenticated, empty body on request). Public (no auth) GET/POST .../public/account-deletion/reason-categories and .../request with JSON {"email":"..."}.

Optional list filters (leave {{listDateFrom}}/{{listDateTo}} empty to skip): dateFrom & dateTo as YYYY-MM-DD or ISO8601 on paginated/date-based lists (sales, expenses, payables, payments, filings, reports, employees, transactions, financial documents, invoices, evidence vault, enterprise filings/reports, AI records). Enterprise evidence vault also accepts legacy startDate & endDate.

Invoice ↔ financial document (optional): POST .../financials/documents/upload and .../upload-invoice accept optional invoiceId (UUID of structured invoice). POST .../financials/invoices and PUT .../invoices/:invoiceId accept optional financialDocumentId (UUID of enterprise_financial_documents row; use {{fileId}} from list/upload). PUT financialDocumentId: null unlinks. Invoice responses include documentId (evidence vault) and financialDocumentId (financial upload). Evidence vault: GET .../evidence-vault/documents/:documentId/invoice-extraction-preview (mock extraction), then POST .../documents/:documentId/convert-to-invoice.

Enterprise GET .../clients/:clientId/reports/export-all returns one PDF merging each matching stored report (by generatedAt range) as separate multi-page sections; if none match, exports one section per calendar month in the range (default last 12 months when dates empty). Optional reportType filter. Response header X-Report-Sections = section count. Max 48 sections.

Mobile inventory (stock / COGS): Base path /mobile/inventory — overview, alerts, items (POST add, GET list + detail), POST .../items/:id/restock (quantity, optional note), POST .../items/:id/adjustment (direction in|out, quantity, optional note; optional createSalesInvoice: same transaction — adjustment in→mobile Sale at unit cost, adjustment out→mobile Expense at unit cost; optional saleDate YYYY-MM-DD, saleCategory, expenseCategory, paymentType, vatableIncome, serviceIncome), POST sell (optional createSalesInvoice mirrors inventory line totals to mobile Sales/invoice; response may include linkedSale), GET movements, GET inventory sales. Requires onboarding complete + Bearer token.

variable.description: Linked mobile user UUID; same as clientId for enterprise /clients/:clientId routes. Used for POST .../mobile/filings/consultant/clients/:clientUserId/...

request.description: Includes filingAuthorization (client must opt in before consultant can POST .../filings/consultant/clients/:id/tax/:type/submit).
Toggle authorized. Email sent to consultant when changing false→true.
Authenticated. Empty JSON body. Sets requestDelete on the user.

exec: var j=pm.response.json(); if(j.status&&j.data&&j.data.length>0){var rows=j.data; var pick=rows.find(function(r){return r.initiator!=='client_to_consultant';})||rows[0]; pm.collectionVariables.set('invitationId',pick.id);}

request.description: Pending requests. initiator: consultant_to_client = you can Accept/Decline here; client_to_consultant = wait for consultant email link.

exec: var j=pm.response.json(); var inner=j.data; var arr=inner&&inner.data?inner.data:[]; if(j.status&&arr.length&&arr[0].id){pm.collectionVariables.set('consultantUserId',arr[0].id);}

request.description: Lists enterprise-onboarded consultants. Empty data if you already have an active consultant. Optional search q (min 2 characters).
Sends the consultant an email with accept/decline links. Connection is created when they accept.
Paste invitation UUID and short code from the email into invitationLinkId and invitationLinkCode. No Authorization header.
Same variables as Accept. No Authorization header.
Optional customerName, customerId (or Customer_name / Customer_id). Responses and lists include customerName, customerId.
At least one field; optional customerName/customerId (Customer_* aliases). VAT recalculated when vatableIncome or amount changes.
Optional supplierName, supplierId (or Supplier_name / Supplier_Id). vatInclusive defaults false in API if omitted — send explicitly if required.
At least one field; optional supplierName/supplierId (Supplier_* aliases).

totalStockValue, lowStockAlertCount, lowStockItems, topSelling (units last 120d), slowMoving (no sale 90d+), movingLowPreview (velocity), stats: potentialRevenue, stockCost, potentialProfit, averageMarginPct.
runningLow, movingLow, counts, stats (stockValueTiedUp for running low, quantity sum, lastSaleDate).

createSalesInvoice: true — creates mobile Sales row in same DB transaction; response.data.linkedSale has id, invoiceNumber, amounts. Test script saves linked sale id to {{saleId}}. Optional paymentType, saleDate (YYYY-MM-DD), saleCategory, vatableIncome, serviceIncome.
Omits createSalesInvoice — only inventory_sale + movements; no row in mobile /sales.
lowStockOnly=true filters to qty <= alert (in-memory). Optional category.
marketAnalysis if all stock sold; recentMovements.
Adds quantity. Movement type RESTOCK. Returns updated item detail.

item.name: Adjust stock in (+ linked sale at cost)

request.description: direction in + createSalesInvoice: true — books a mobile Sale at purchase cost × qty. Response.data.linkedSale when present. Optional paymentType, vatableIncome, serviceIncome.

item.name: Adjust stock out (+ linked expense at cost)

request.description: direction out + createSalesInvoice: true — books a mobile Expense at purchase cost × qty (supplier from item if set). Response.data.linkedExpense. expenseCategory: Rent, Tools & Software, Marketing, Internet, Salary, Other.
No createSalesInvoice — inventory movement only.
Period overview + vat, wht, cit. cit includes capitalAllowances and lossCarryForward (0 when not tracked in-app).

exec: var j=pm.response.json(); var caps=j.data&&j.data.capabilities; if(j.status&&caps&&caps.length){var vat=caps.find(function(c){return c.code==='VAT';}); if(vat&&vat.code)pm.collectionVariables.set('unifiedTaxType',vat.code);}

request.description: Tax types, capabilities (preview kind + unified paths), paymentStatuses, filingStatuses, reportTypes, period bounds, enterpriseTaxComputationPaths. Optional: test script sets unifiedTaxType from first capability (or keep {{unifiedTaxType}}).
VAT: calculation. WHT: schedule (optional &whtType=). CIT/PAYE/other: manual preview. Query period=YYYY-M also works.

item.name: Unified - save draft by tax type

request.description: VAT: stateOfOperation, vatRegistrationNumber. WHT: whtType, lines[]. Generic types: period only creates minimal draft.
WHT: use amount or totalWht as total WHT due. VAT/CIT/PAYE: amount required.

Auth as consultant (mobile login). {{clientUserId}} = linked client mobile user UUID (set from Enterprise Clients list or Managed Entities; same as {{clientId}}). clientApprovalConfirmed must be true.

Optional status: pending | submitted | paid | overdue (display filter). Each row: completionPercent, completion.items[] (stable key + human-readable label), periodRecordCompliance, periodAttachmentGaps.
Same completion checklist + periodRecordCompliance as list. VAT: merges draft state/TIN when payable fields empty.
Client rows include filingAuthorization.

exec: var j=pm.response.json(); var arr=j.data||[]; if(j.status&&arr.length>0){var c=arr.find(function(x){return x.type==='accepted';}); if(c&&c.id){pm.collectionVariables.set('clientId',c.id); pm.collectionVariables.set('clientUserId',c.id);}}

request.description: Accepted rows: filingsStatus counts, filingAuthorization (client allowed consultant to file on their behalf). id = mobile user UUID.
filingAuthorization (boolean|null) top-level + consultantLink.filingAuthorization. filings.summary, filings.recent.
Includes filingAuthorization (boolean|null).
Single calendar month. Use {{plYear}} / {{plMonth}} or literals.
Linked client only: no year/month defaults to current calendar month (not full year).
year without month = Jan–Dec for that year.
YTD through today for current calendar year.
Inclusive custom dates (YYYY-MM-DD).

Optional query: status (or legacy documentStatus) filters effective document status (documentStatus ?? processingStatus), e.g. clean, pending, processed, review, flagged. q searches vendor, invoice number, description, document type. Pagination: page, limit, sortBy=documentDate, sortOrder.
With linked client: creates a Sale. Optional customerName, customerId (or Customer_name / Customer_id).
Creates an Expense for linked client. Optional supplierName, supplierId (or Supplier_name / Supplier_Id).
Optional: add "invoiceId":"{{invoiceId}}" to link this file to an existing invoice (same client).
Run List invoices first so {{invoiceId}} is set.
Optional: add "invoiceId":"{{invoiceId}}" to link upload to invoice.
Mock updates the EnterpriseFinancialDocument row (vendor, amounts, documentStatus clean, processingStatus processed) so List documents reflects OCR without a separate store.
Optional: "financialDocumentId":"{{fileId}}" to link a financial upload row.
Set {{fileId}} from List documents or Upload document.
financialDocumentId: UUID to link, or null to unlink. Omit key to leave link unchanged.
Mock suggestedInvoice (client fields, lineItems). Wire real extraction later.
Sets invoice documentId to this evidence document. Optionally align body with extraction preview.
Same payload as mobile /filings/constants: tax types, capabilities, enums, enterpriseTaxComputationPaths.
VAT-only list; each row includes taxType.
Omit taxType or leave empty for all taxes. Use taxType=VAT|WHT|CIT|PAYE to filter (must be active). Response: data.returns, data.taxTypeFilter.

exec: var j=pm.response.json(); var tt=j.data&&j.data.taxTypes; if(j.status&&tt&&tt.length){var first=tt[0]; if(first&&first.id)pm.collectionVariables.set('filingTaxTypeOptionId',first.id);}

request.description: Active codes (e.g. VAT, CIT, WHT, PAYE). Test script saves first option id to {{filingTaxTypeOptionId}} for Update.
Run List filing tax types first (or paste UUIDs from GET). options[]: id (required), optional label, sortOrder, isActive.
Optional status filters tax_payables.status (e.g. pending, paid). Paginated filings with completion checklist; test script sets {{filingId}} from first row for Get filing / report.

Same payload as mobile GET /filings/:id: timeline, completion (checklist labels), periodRecordCompliance, periodAttachmentGaps, totalPaid, documentUrl, evidenceVaultId. Uses TaxPayable id as {{filingId}}. 404 if not found for client.

Uses TaxPayable id as filingId. 200 with Report fields when a stored report matches period/tax; includes taxType. If no Report row, 200 stub: hasGeneratedReport false, id null, period from filing, documentUrl from payable if set. 404 if filing not found for client.
taxType must be an active code from GET .../filings/tax-types (e.g. VAT, WHT, CIT, PAYE). Test script saves created id to {{filingId}}.
VAT-only submit for enterprise acting as client (no taxType). Optional: dueDate (ISO8601), receiptUrl, evidenceVaultId, stateOfOperation, vatRegistrationNumber.
Same body as VAT; amount is total WHT due.
breakdown.cit includes capitalAllowances and lossCarryForward (0 when not tracked in-app).
No auth. Same categories payload as mobile.
No auth. Generic success message whether or not the email exists.
